title: YEBW (Young Entrepreneurs Business Week)
html:
YEBW (Young Entrepreneurs Business Week)

Oregon week-long high-school entrepreneurship program — the single most-cited formative pre-college credential across Yahir's 2019–2021 application materials. Surfaces in seven different documents from his junior year through OSU acceptance, always in two modes: (1) resume bullet and (2) director-of-YEBW as a flagged contact.

Chronology

  • 2019-06-25 — 2019 06 25 anticipate the future through scenarios — first vault mention; YEBW prep / scenarios mindset
  • 2019-07-14 — 2019 07 14 ondine hall — Ondine Hall = YEBW dorm at PSU (Portland State)
  • 2019-08-11 — 2019 08 11 finish packing shit in morning — final packing, YEBW imminent
  • 2019-08-12 — 2019 08 12 keep things simple — post-YEBW debrief, including the "Have an elevator pitch for yourself" line that becomes the elevator pitch concept
  • 2019-08-18 — 2019 08 18 contact yebw people — explicit follow-up list, including the YEBW director as a relationship to maintain
  • 2020-04-23 — 2020 04 23 go to diamond — YEBW cited in scholarship-essay context
  • 2020-12-17 — 2020 12 17 osu app final — YEBW on the OSU application
  • 2021-01-07 / 2021-01-26 — 2021 01 07 Oregon State App 1 / 2021 01 26 Oregon State Application — YEBW on the formal application
  • 2021-04-13 — 2021 04 13 diana hoff renaissance email — YEBW cited in the Renaissance Scholarship outreach
  • 2022-06-25 — 2022 06 25 officiail resume — YEBW survives onto the official resume

Why it matters

YEBW is the inflection point for Yahir's pitching identity. The "have an elevator pitch for yourself" heuristic (elevator pitch), the "pitching is bidirectional like dating" frame, and the collect-the-director-as-mentor move all originate or crystallize here. It's also the first vault evidence of the Grants Pass teen practicing the collect-mentors reflex.

Source summaries

  • 2019 08 11 voice memo 2017 — YBW leadership keynote (live-to-work-or-work-to-live)
  • 2019 08 12 keep things simple — debrief, elevator-pitch line
  • 2019 08 15 voice memo 1852 — Portland-area VC sales talk (same week, complementary lens)
  • 2019 08 18 contact yebw people — follow-up list
  • 2019 06 25 anticipate the future through scenarios
  • 2019 07 14 ondine hall
  • 2019 08 11 finish packing shit in morning
  • 2020 04 23 go to diamond
  • 2020 12 17 osu app final
  • 2021 01 07 Oregon State App 1
  • 2021 01 26 Oregon State Application
  • 2021 04 13 diana hoff renaissance email
  • 2022 06 25 officiail resume
